error_signature: workflow hangs indefinitely on Code Node
title: Workflow hangs on Code Node after update
symptom: Workflows get stuck on the Code Node without failing or throwing an error. The execution hangs indefinitely.
not_this_if: Code Node executes successfully without hanging
root_cause: Following a recent update, changes in the execution environment or code handling may cause the Code Node to stall, especially if the code has not been reviewed or updated to align with the new version's requirements.
fix_steps: Review and update your code, even if it’s just a minor edit or reformatting
agent_instruction: Review and update the code in the Code Node, then save and test the workflow.
